channel.title: The Stride Project — Field Tested
channel.description: Real-world experiments in human performance — written from the dirt patch, not the laboratory. I'm the test subject. You get the verdict.

item.title: Building the Foundation: Youth Athlete Protocol
item.description: My younger brother asked me to build him a workout program for high school sports. Here's the simple, foundation-first 3-day athlete split I designed — and why simplicity beats complexity at this stage.

item.title: The 33-Day Deployment Cut: Chaos, Creatine, and Data
item.description: Thirty-three days into the deployment cut — here's the full daily log. Weight, body fat, the training shift, and what the raw data taught me about cutting when you can't control the kitchen.

item.title: Deployment Nutrition: Fueling the Cut
item.description: Bulking is a chore. Cutting is a grind. Throw a deployment in the mix and the whole equation gets harder — here's exactly how I plate my meals at the DFAC to hit my macros while on a cut.

item.title: Bypassing the Burnout: Finding Time to Train
item.description: How to drop the caffeine crutch, defeat late-day fatigue, and exploit hidden windows in your schedule to get the work done.

item.title: The Science of the Outdoor Grind
item.description: From deployment dirt patches to the science of sunlight: why skipping the conventional gym might just lower your cortisol and fix your sleep.

item.title: Nature's Obstacle Course
item.description: From the buoyancy of the Dead Sea to the rugged canyons of the Mujib Nature Reserve, exploring how functional fitness lets us experience the world's most incredible spectacles.

item.title: The Spark of Performance
item.description: Why I started this journey, my time in the military, and the commitment to finding the gap between average and exceptional.
